logs.title: Week 1: The Beginning of the Journey
logs.excerpt: My first week interning at MIH. Onboarding, setting up tools, and diving into the legacy codebase.
logs.content:
This week was primarily focused on onboarding and getting to know the team. I set up my development environment and spent several hours reading through documentation for our primary stack: Next.js and Firebase. 

Key takeaways:
- Communication is vital in a remote setting.
- Standardizing linting across the team saves hours of PR back-and-forth.
- I need to brush up on my advanced TypeScript generics.

logs.title: Week 4: Mastering Technical SEO
logs.excerpt: A deep dive into Core Web Vitals and how to optimize them for real-world performance.
logs.content:
Spent the week working closely with the SEO team. I learned that technical SEO is far more than just meta tags. We focused on optimizing LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) by preloading critical assets and implementing better image optimization strategies.

Techniques used:
- Image priority flags in Next.js.
- Critical CSS extraction.
- Reducing third-party script bloat.
